results.stdout: Patched template.yaml: MLB uses stable proxy routes, quarter-hour MLB HOT schedule, and daily lock.
Patched template.yaml with dedicated MLB v3 reads, explicit pull/lock admin tokens, and production verifier resources.
Patched MLB results routes and routed final deploy smoke check through main API.
MLB official/playable, immutable-ledger, selected-odds, and real-world accuracy metrics verified

MLB complete-slate coverage, AWS daily lock, no-backfill policy, and doubleheader-safe audit verified
MLB immutable locked storage verified: live rows cannot overwrite locked rows and locked rows are write-once
MLB daily lock ML vector preservation verified: exact vector, fingerprint, timestamps, semantics, selected price, and blank pregame labels survive compaction; invalid cards fail before storage.
MLB accuracy targets verified: 90% applies only to the rolling 24-hour all-games audit; 60% applies to recommendation/reliability validation.
MLB ML optimization v3 verified: immutable pregame features, final-label join, dual models, untouched priced ROI, independent gates, and shadow-only runtime
MLB ML promotion safety verified: automatic promotion is impossible; reviewed DynamoDB promotion is required
MLB frozen feature integrity verified: fingerprint, game identity, lock timestamp, and selected-side price source are enforced
{
  "ok": true,
  "proofType": "MLB_ML_INSTALLATION_1_5",
  "version": "MLB-ML-INSTALLATION-1-5-v1.1-priced-postgreen",
  "checks": {
    "1_cleanPostFixCohort": {
      "installed": true,
      "exactVectorVersion": "MLB-ML-FROZEN-FEATURE-SNAPSHOT-v1-home-away-outcome",
      "fingerprintVerified": true,
      "outcomeLabelsAbsentAtLock": true,
      "selectedSideOddsAndSourcePresent": true
    },
    "2_separateOutcomeAndReliabilityModels": {
      "installed": true,
      "outcomeModelVersion": "MLB-OUTCOME-MODEL-v1-home-win-probability",
      "reliabilityModelVersion": "MLB-RELIABILITY-MODEL-v1.2-selected-pick-correctness-priced",
      "probabilitiesInterchangeable": false
    },
    "3_chronologicalValidation": {
      "installed": true,
      "trainMinimum": 80,
      "validationMinimum": 30,
      "untouchedTestMinimum": 30,
      "thresholdSelection": "validation_only"
    },
    "4_baseballFundamentals": {
      "installed": true,
      "snapshotVersion": "MLB-FUNDAMENTALS-SNAPSHOT-v1-timestamped-source-honest",
      "connectedGroups": [
        "confirmed_probable_pitchers"
      ],
      "missingGroups": [
        "fip_xfip",
        "wrc_plus",
        "starter_handedness_splits",
        "bullpen_fatigue",
        "confirmed_lineups",
        "weather_wind_roof",
        "ballpark_factors",
        "injuries_late_scratches_news",
        "public_betting_handle",
        "closing_line_value"
      ],
      "missingInputsFabricated": false,
      "modelScopeUntilFeedsConnected": "MARKET_MOVEMENT_ONLY_WITH_MISSINGNESS"
    },
    "5_acceptanceAndPromotionGates": {
      "installed": true,
      "directionAndPlayabilityIndependent": true,
      "automaticPromotion": false,
      "manualReviewedDynamoDbPromotionRequired": true,
      "minimumCleanOfficial": 500,
      "minimumUntouchedTest": 100
    }
  },
  "cleanSettlementJoinVerified": true,
  "policy": "All five optimization components are installed. Production ML remains shadow-only until clean evidence and reviewed promotion gates pass."
}
{
  "ok": true,
  "modelVersion": "INQSI-MLB-v3.0-clean-dual-model-shadow-challenger",
  "runtime": {
    "applied": true,
    "version": "MLB-ML-RUNTIME-INSTALL-v3.3-separated-accuracy-targets",
    "steps": {
      "accuracyTargetsSeparated": true,
      "legacyReliabilityOverlaySafety": true,
      "sourceHonestFundamentals": true,
      "singleDdbChampionAuthority": true,
      "officialSemanticsFinalized": true,
      "exactCleanCohortVectorPatch": true,
      "officialFreezeBridge": true,
      "immutableFeatureFreeze": true
    },
    "errors": [],
    "accuracyTargetPolicy": {
      "ok": true,
      "version": "MLB-ACCURACY-TARGET-POLICY-v1-90pct-all-games-audit-60pct-recommendation",
      "rolling24hAllGamesAuditTargetPct": 90.0,
      "recommendationReliabilityThresholdPct": 60.0,
      "patched": [
        "runtime_safety_60pct",
        "champion_playability_60pct"
      ],
      "errors": [],
      "policy": "Ninety percent is reporting-only for the rolling 24-hour all-games audit. Sixty percent is the reliability/recommendation threshold and never removes the required winner prediction for a game."
    },
    "ok": true,
    "policy": "The reviewed DynamoDB champion is the only model allowed to change direction or playability. The rolling 24-hour all-games audit target is 90%, while recommendation reliability uses 60%. Every new locked game stores the exact immutable clean-cohort vector before final labels exist."
  }
}
Dedicated MLB v3 Lambda cold import and runtime contract verified
MLB production invariants PASS: complete-slate coverage, immutable write-once locked storage, exact ML lock vector survives daily-card compaction and invalid cards fail closed, 90% rolling all-games audit separated from the 60% recommendation threshold, exact clean-cohort lock vectors, final-label joins, separate outcome/reliability models, untouched validation with priced ROI, source-honest fundamentals, independent promotion gates, manual-only DDB champion promotion, and single runtime authority are installed.

policy: Patch the SAM template exactly as deploy.yml does, run the mandatory production invariant, then restore the source template.
